query_normalized: predicting battery electrolyte decomposition products via dft and machine learning chemistry
rationale: The paper focuses on general validation standards for machine learning in biology, which is an off-domain application (biology vs. battery chemistry) and does not address the specific mechanism (electrolyte decomposition), domain (materials science), or variables (DFT/ML predictions of decomposition products) of the user's question.
